prompt:
A lavish high-fantasy collectible character card in a premium mobile RPG style, full-frame vertical composition with an ornate black-and-gold filigree border and luminous emerald accents. The card depicts リネア / RINEA, a mystical forest priestess standing in an enchanted woodland stream, wearing layered flowing robes in ivory, sage green, moss, and muted gold, with long translucent veils, floral embroidery, vine-like trim, delicate beadwork, and many small white blossoms woven through the outfit and hair. Her face is mostly shadowed beneath a hood and veil for an ethereal anonymous look. She holds a slender wooden bow wrapped with vines and blossoms. Behind her stands a majestic spirit deer made of living wood and roots, with branching antlers covered in flowers, glowing pale eyes, and a swirling magical vortex of teal-green light in its chest. The background is a dense sacred forest with tall trees, dappled light rays, floating motes, glowing wisps, circular magic rings, water reflections, and soft green-blue atmospheric mist. Use ultra-detailed fantasy illustration rendering, elegant painterly realism, rich texture, luminous magical effects, intricate costume design, and premium trading-card polish.

At the top center, a dark green nameplate with gold trim reads "神異 - Divine Anomaly -". At the top left, place a very large iridescent rarity mark "UR" with a violet-to-cyan glow and exactly 7 gold stars beneath it. At the top right, add a circular green elemental emblem with white leaf and wind motifs, and beneath it a small plaque reading "属性 木・風 WOOD + WIND". Near the lower center, add a large rounded dark green plaque with gold edging showing the character name "リネア / RINEA" and the subtitle "西の森の巫女 / Priestess of the Western Forest".

Create exactly 3 middle information panels above the stats row, each dark green with gold borders and a circular icon: panel 1 labeled "守護神" with the value "森の精霊鹿" and English subtitle "Forest Spirit Deer"; panel 2 labeled "役割" with the value "浄化・再生" and English subtitle "Purify Regenerate"; panel 3 labeled "スキル" with the value "鎮魂の森風" and English subtitle "Requiem of Verdant Souls".

Create exactly 5 bottom stat panels with icons and large serif numerals, reading from left to right: "ATK 720", "DEF 810", "SPD 840", "MAG 910", "SUP 880". Overall style: premium gacha card UI, sacred nature fantasy, ornate decorative framing, glowing emerald and gold color palette, crisp typography, symmetrical polished layout, highly detailed and majestic.
